business_ideas.idea: Founders incubator space with hardware lab, robotics shop, machine shop
Early-stage hardware/tech startup investment with hands-on mentorship
Decentralized finance lending protocols with algorithmic collateralization
Liquidity pools for DEX trading generating yield on stable coin pairs

predictions.text: Crypto will rebuild entire financial system in parallel to traditional banking
Permissionless DeFi enables credit access without traditional credit checks
Commodity hardware plus software will replace entire engineering teams
Physical founder communities (like Monkey Inferno) are essential for early-stage success
